sentences.arabic: بَدَأْتُ أُخَطِّطُ لِرِحْلَتِي الْقَادِمَةِ فَوْرَ عُودَتِي مِنَ الرِّحْلَةِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Počeo sam planirati sljedeće putovanje čim sam se vratio s prethodnog.
sentences.translationEn: I started planning my next trip as soon as I returned from the previous one.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثْتُ عَنْ وِجْهَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ عَلَى الإِنْتِرْنِتِ وَقَرَأْتُ مَقَالَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Tražio sam nova odredišta na internetu i čitao mnogo članaka.
sentences.translationEn: I searched for new destinations online and read many articles.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَرْتُ بَلَدًا لَمْ أَزُرْهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَبَدَأْتُ بِادِّخَارِ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Izabrao sam zemlju u kojoj nikad nisam bio i počeo štedjeti novac.
sentences.translationEn: I chose a country I had never visited and started saving money.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبْتُ قَائِمَةً بِالأَمَاكِنِ الَّتِي أُرِيدُ رُؤْيَتَهَا.
sentences.translation: Napisao sam listu mjesta koja želim posjetiti.
sentences.translationEn: I wrote a list of places I wanted to see.

sentences.arabic: السَّفَرُ لَيْسَ حَدَثًا مُنْفَرِدًا بَلْ أُسْلُوبُ حَيَاةٍ مُسْتَمِرٌّ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje nije jednokratni događaj, već stalan način života.
sentences.translationEn: Travelling is not a one-off event but a continuous way of life.
